name: Old Fashioned Lemon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Blend flour, salt and baking powder together.
3. Cream butter until smooth.
4. Beat in sugar and eggs one at a time.
5. Add dry ingredients alternately to the creamed mixture with milk.
6. Fold in lemon rind and nuts.
7. Spoon batter into a greased 8" x 4-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake for 55-60 minutes or until done.
9. Cool for 5 minutes in the pan.
10. Combine sugar and lemon juice to make a glaze.
11. Pour over warm loaf.
12. Remove loaf from pan when cool.
